Combat sport events in 2025
ONE 172: Takeru vs. Rodtang
The poster for ONE 172: Takeru vs. Rodtang
PromotionONE Championship
DateMarch 23, 2025 (2025-03-23)
VenueSaitama Super Arena
CitySaitama, Japan
Attendance15,000[1]
Total gate$2,000,000[1]
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 101: Nakrob vs. Puengluang ONE 172: Takeru vs. Rodtang ONE Friday Fights 102: Rambong vs. Pompet (Canceled)

ONE 172: Takeru vs. Rodtang was a combat sports event produced by ONE Championship that took place on March 23, 2025, at the Saitama Super Arena in Saitama, Japan.[2][3]

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's first visit to Saitama and fifth to Japan since ONE 165 in January 2024.[4]

A five-round flyweight kickboxing superfight between former ONE Flyweight Muay Thai World Champion Rodtang Jitmuangnon and former three-divisions K-1 World Champion Takeru Segawa headlined the event.[5] The pair was previously scheduled to headline at ONE 165 in January 2024, but Rodtang withdrew from the bout due to injury.[6]

An interim ONE Featherweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between the current ONE Featherweight Muay Thai World Champion Tawanchai P.K.Saenchai and former K-1 Super Lightweight and Welterweight Champion Masaaki Noiri served as the co-main event.[7]

A ONE Flyweight World Championship rematch for the vacant title between former three-time champion Adriano Moraes and Yuya Wakamatsu took place at third title fights.[8] The duo previously met at ONE: X in March 2022, which Moraes defended the title by third round submission.[9]

An interim ONE Strawweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between former champions (also former ONE Flyweight and Strawweight Muay Thai World Champion) Sam-A Gaiyanghadao and Jonathan Di Bella took place the second of title fights.[7]

A ONE Women's Atomweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between current champion Phetjeeja Lukjaoporongtom and former K-1 Women's Flyweight Champion Kana Morimoto took place the first title fights.[10]

A ONE Bantamweight Muay Thai World Championship unification bout between then champion (also the current ONE Flyweight Kickboxing World Champion) Superlek Kiatmuu9 and interim champion Nabil Anane took place at the event.[7] The duo previously met at ONE Friday Fights 22 in June 2023, which Superlek won by first round knockout.[11] At the weigh-ins, Superlek failed the hydration test and came in at 146.25 pounds, 1.25 pounds over the bantamweight limit. As a results, Superlek was stripped of the title and the bout was switched to three-round non-title bout.[12][13]

Adrian Lee and promotional newcomer Shozo Isojima were scheduled to meet in a lightweight MMA bout, but Isojima withdrew due to injury and was replaced by another newcomer Takeharu Ogawa.[14]

At the weigh-ins, three fighters also failed to hydration test and missed weight for their respective fights:[12][15]

  • Former Glory Lightweight Champion Marat Grigorian weighed in at 155.75 pounds, 0.75 pounds over the featherweight limit and the bout was cancelled after Kaito Ono declined the catchweight bout.[16]
  • Ogawa weighed in at 173.5 pounds, 3.5 pounds over the lightweight limit and he was fined 20% of purse, which went to Lee.
  • Suriyanlek Por.Yenying weighed in at 132.25 pounds, 0.25 pounds over the 132 pounds limit and he was fined the 20% of purse, which went to Ryusei Kumagai.

Results

[edit]
Main card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Flyweight Kickboxing Rodtang Jitmuangnon def. Takeru Segawa KO (punch) 1 1:20
Featherweight Kickboxing Masaaki Noiri def. Tawanchai P.K.Saenchai TKO (punches) 3 1:55 [a]
Flyweight Yuya Wakamatsu def. Adriano Moraes TKO (punches) 1 3:39 [b]
Strawweight Kickboxing Jonathan Di Bella def. Sam-A Gaiyanghadao Decision (unanimous) 5 3:00 [c]
Women's Atomweight Kickboxing Phetjeeja Lukjaoporongtom (c) def. Kana Morimoto Decision (unanimous) 5 3:00 [d]
Bantamweight Muay Thai Nabil Anane def. Superlek Kiatmuu9 Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00 [e]
Atomweight Muay Thai Nadaka Yoshinari def. Rak Erawan KO (punch) 3 2:40
Lightweight Shinya Aoki def. Eduard Folayang Submission (armbar) 1 0:53
Bantamweight Kickboxing Hiroki Akimoto def. John Lineker Decision (split) 3 3:00
Lightweight Adrian Lee def. Takeharu Ogawa Submission (anaconda choke) 1 1:03 [f]
Flyweight Muay Thai Shimon Yoshinari def. Yodlekpet Or.Atchariya Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Preliminary card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Flyweight Kickboxing Hyu Iwata def. Zakaria El Jamari KO (knee) 1 2:13
Catchweight (132 lbs) Kickboxing Ryusei Kumagai def. Suriyanlek Por.Yenying Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00 [g]
  1. ^ For the interim ONE Featherweight Kickboxing World Championship.
  2. ^ For the vacant ONE Flyweight World Championship.
  3. ^ For the interim ONE Strawweight Kickboxing World Championship.
  4. ^ For the ONE Women's Atomweight Kickboxing World Championship.
  5. ^ Non-title bout, Superlek missed weight (146.25 lb).
  6. ^ Ogawa missed weight (173.5 lb).
  7. ^ Suriyanlek missed weight (132.5 lb).

[17]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses:[18]

  • Performance of the Night: Rodtang Jitmuangnon, Masaaki Noiri, Yuya Wakamatsu and Adrian Lee
